title: lysimachia deltoidea var. brunelloides
intro: Lysimachia deltoidea var. brunelloides, also known as the golden or yellow loosestrife, is a perennial plant species within the Primulaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture, with some herbal preparations also incorporating it into salves or poultices for topical use.
